title: Energizer LED Energy Saving Lightbulb, E14, Daylight, 4.2W
features: Energizer LED Lighting - High performance, economical and sustainable technologies
Led E14 - Easy replacement light bulb with a flicker free design. A true retro fit with even light distribution
Enjoy 15, 000 hours of 'natural Daylight' With this high performance, economical and energy saving light bulb from Energizer
description: From the manufacturer What is a Kelvin (K)? A Kelvin (K) is the unit colour temperature is measured in. The higher the Kelvin, the cooler the colour. A lamp between 2,700K and 3,000K is classed as " warm " white light. A lamp with 4,000K is classed as " cool " white light. A lamp between 6,000K and 6,500K is classed as " daylight " or a more natural white light. Energizer Lighting Energizer LED uses up to 85% less energy! Energizer products are recognised as one of the most trusted and highly desirable consumer brands on the market. The entire LED light bulb range includes high performance, economical and sustainable technologies designed for use all year round. The lighting collection comprises all of the most popular bulb shapes and cap sizes, and also offers dimmable and non-dimmable solutions for all household fittings. Long Service Life 15,000+ Hours of Light An Energy Efficient Source Resistant to Breakage Lower Operating Temperature compared to Incandescent Lights ** Compared to Incandescent Lighting B15 - Small Bayonet Bulb B22 - Large Bayonet Bulb E14 - Small Screw Cap Bulb E27 - Large Screw Cap Bulb
